# defectdojo_engagement (Data Source)

DefectDojo Engagement data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_engagement" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `api_test` (Boolean) Whether an API test was performed
- `branch_tag` (String) Tag or branch of the product the engagement tested
- `build_id` (String) Build ID of the product the engagement tested
- `check_list` (Boolean) Whether a check list was used
- `commit_hash` (String) Commit hash from repo
- `deduplication_on_engagement` (Boolean) Whether deduplication is on engagement level
- `description` (String) Description of the Engagement
- `engagement_type` (String) Type of Engagement
- `first_contacted` (String) Date first contacted (format: 2006-01-02)
- `lead` (Number) ID of the lead user
- `name` (String) Name of the Engagement
- `pen_test` (Boolean) Whether a pen test was performed
- `preset` (Number) ID of the preset for this Engagement
- `product` (Number) ID of the Product this Engagement belongs to
- `reason` (String) Reason for the Engagement
- `report_type` (Number) ID of the report type
- `requester` (Number) ID of the requester
- `source_code_management_uri` (String) Resource link to source code
- `status` (String) Status of the Engagement
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags for this Engagement
- `target_end` (String) End date of the Engagement (format: 2006-01-02)
- `target_start` (String) Start date of the Engagement (format: 2006-01-02)
- `test_strategy` (String) Test strategy for the engagement
- `threat_model` (Boolean) Whether a threat model was performed
- `tracker` (String) Link to epic or ticket system
- `version` (String) Version of the product being tested
